issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving duplicate tasks across multiple workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were being enrolled in duplicate tasks across pre-referral, post-referral, and sale pending workflows. The root cause was a bugged filter related to Loan Simple lead associations in HubSpot. Madelaine worked with HubSpot support to resolve the filter issue.
issues.workaround: Review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and manually close or dismiss the duplicate tasks.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs were receiving weekly check-in tasks from the post-referral workflow even after deals were marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow filters were not correctly excluding these terminal deal stages. Madelaine made a tweak to the filters to resolve the issue.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any check-in tasks that were generated after a deal was marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: Automated emails showing previous loan officer after LO change
issues.desc: When a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated emails sent to agents continued to display the previous LO's information instead of the updated one. The issue was identified on a specific deal and escalated to product. Luis resolved the issue.
issues.workaround: Manually send corrected agent introduction emails with the updated loan officer information for any deals where the LO was changed during the impact window.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering after deal stage reverted and reset
issues.desc: When a deal was moved to Offer Accepted, then reverted to a prior stage, and then moved back to Offer Accepted, the TC workflow tasks did not re-trigger on the second transition. The root cause was that deal stage re-enrollment criteria did not include Offer Accepted. Madelaine added Offer Accepted as a re-enrollment trigger.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that cycled through Offer Accepted more than once during the impact window to ensure TC tasks are generated.

issues.title: MRC deals marked Offer Accepted not enrolling TCs into workflow tasks
issues.desc: MRC deals updated to Offer Accepted were not triggering the TC workflow, meaning TCs received no tasks for closing coordination. Madelaine spoke with HubSpot support and the issue was resolved. The root cause was not explicitly stated.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any MRC deals that were marked Offer Accepted during the impact window into the TC workflow to generate the required closing tasks.
